name: Gendai Agency Inc.
summary: Gendai Agency Inc. engages in planning and production of advertising and promotion services in Japan. The company provides advertising services, online and mass media advertising, newspaper flyers, and sales promotions. Its services include video and web content production; and research and development. The company also engages in the planning, production, construction, and management of outdoor advertising; and real estate activities. In addition, it operates casino and electronic casino facilities; sells slot machines, etc.; and offers consulting services. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
